stories.title: Follow live: De Ketelaere levels for Belgium after...
No GPS tracker for Arnold, can work out for teams
stories.summary: Former Lions cornerback Terrion Arnold does not need to wear a GPS tracker as a condition of his release, a Florida judge ruled Friday, allowing him to continue to work out with NFL teams in an effort to get re-signed after being cut.

stories.title: Boynton agrees to 2-year deal as Michigan coach
stories.summary: Mike Boynton Jr. has agreed on a two-year contract to become the next head men's basketball coach at Michigan, the school announced on Friday.

stories.title: Sinner beats Djokovic, returns to Wimbledon final
stories.summary: Top-ranked Jannik Sinner will play for his second consecutive Wimbledon title after defeating seven-time champion Novak Djokovic 6-4, 6-4, 6-4 in the semifinals Friday.

stories.title: Tide lands top in-state QB prospect for 2028
stories.summary: Alabama has secured the commitment of top in-state QB prospect Kingston Preyear, the No. 3 pocket passer in ESPN's 2028 recruiting class.
